definitions: 机器人发牌员；自动发牌装置（尤指纸牌游戏中负责发牌的机器）

examples.text: Each assassin immediately and covertly swaps one of the cards they’ve been fairly dealt with their signature card. Then the robo-dealer reveals three shared cards on the table. After betting, the assassins play their signature cards as a signal that they’re ready.
examples.explanation: 这里的 robo-dealer 指“机器人发牌员”或“自动发牌装置”。句子意思是：在每个刺客暗中换牌之后，这个自动发牌系统会在桌上翻开三张公共牌。该词重点不是 dealer 的“商人”义，而是牌局里“发牌者”的意思。

source.text: Can you solve the secret assassin society riddle? - Alex Rosenthal
